data.content: Implementation review: approved. Reviewed origin/codex/0f8e-claude-ship-release-skill against origin/main. The branch changes only .claude/skills/ship-release/SKILL.md. Verified the Claude skill and .agents skill are identical by diff and SHA-256 (48237d15e0119ca4cd1bf54da6f9b6b72272f0fd111e274509abb28fb492fc38). Prior handoff recorded all sanity gates passing: diff --check, lint, typecheck, unit tests, and build. No regressions or workflow-policy concerns found.
